jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Babyoye
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!
